name: Ice Cream Recipe (No Maker Req'd)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, fold whipped cream into milk.
2. Pour mixture into an aluminum foil-lined 9x5 inch loaf pan.
3. Cover the pan and freeze for at least 6 hours or until firm.
4. Scoop ice cream from the pan or remove it, peel off the foil, and slice.
5. Return leftovers to the freezer.
Flavored variations:
Coconut Almond: Add 2 Tbsp water, 2 egg yolks, 4 tsp vanilla extract, and 2 cups whipping cream with half a cup toasted flaked coconut and half a cup toasted slivered almonds. Follow the same steps as above.
Coffee: Add 1 Tbsp instant coffee dissolved in 2 Tbsp water, 2 beaten egg yolks, 4 tsp vanilla extract, and 2 cups whipping cream. Follow the same steps as above.
French Vanilla: Add 2 Tbsp water, 2 beaten egg yolks, 4 tsp vanilla extract, and 2 cups whipping cream. Follow the same steps as above.
Mint Chocolate Chip: Add 3 Tbsp water, 1/2 cup chocolate chips (small), and mix with 2 cups whipping cream. Add peppermint extract and green food coloring. Follow the same steps as above.
Mocha: Add 2/3 cup chocolate syrup, 1 Tbsp instant coffee dissolved in 1 tsp hot water, and 2 cups whipping cream. Follow the same steps as above.
Strawberry: Thaw frozen strawberries (do not drain) and blend until smooth. Combine with milk and fold in 2 cups whipping cream. Follow the same steps as above.
Butter Pecan: Add 2 Tbsp butter with chopped pecans, 2 beaten egg yolks, 1 tsp maple flavoring, and 2 cups whipping cream. Fold in the mixture. Follow the same steps as above.
Chocolate: Add 2/3 cup chocolate syrup and 2 cups whipping cream. Combine well. Follow the same steps as above.
